case_title: TELLY CHANG VS. DAVID CHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR WATT, CAMERON DONALD AS ATTORNEY FOR CHANG, TELLY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-04-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-14-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHANG, TELLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, DAVID DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-21-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-20-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-29-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-21-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-04-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
